title: Method and electronic device for rendering background in image
abstract: Accordingly the embodiments herein provide a method for rendering a background in an image by an electronic device (100). The method includes recognizing, by the electronic device (100), foreground objects and background objects of the image. Further,the method includes determining, by the electronic device (100), a context of the foreground objects and a context of the background objects in the image. Further,the method includes determining, by the electronic device (100), a background pattern based on the context of the foreground objects and the context of the background objects. Further,the method includes modifying, by the electronic device (100), the background of the image based on the background pattern. Further,the method includes displaying, by the electronic device (100), the image with the modified background.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A method for rendering a background in an image by an electronic device (100), comprising: recognizing, by the electronic device (100), foreground objects and background objects of the image; determining, by the electronic device (100), a context of the foreground objects and a context of the background objects in the image; determining, by the electronic device (100), a background pattern based on the context of the foreground objects and the context of the background objects; modifying, by the electronic device (100), the background of the image based on the background pattern; and displaying, by the electronic device (100), the image with the modified background. The method of claim 1, wherein modifying, by the electronic device (100), the background of the image based on the background pattern comprising: determining an effect and at least one of a shape, an object, and a surfacebased on the background pattern; and transforming at least one of a shape, an object, and a surface available in the background of the image with at least one of the shape, the object, and the surface based on the effect. The method of claim 2, wherein the transforming is done by at least one of: blurring the shape, the object, and the surface available in the background of the image based on the effect; overlaying the shape, the object, and the surfacein the background pattern over the shape, the object, and the surface available in the background of the image based on the effect; and replacing the shape, the object, and the surface available in the background of the image with the shape, the object, and the surface in the background pattern based on the effect. The method of claim 1, wherein determining, by the electronic device (100), the context of the foreground objects comprising: determining a dominant foreground object from the foreground objects based on at least one of an activity in a foreground, an event information, a shape of the foreground object, a size of the foreground object, and a motion of the foreground object; classifying the dominant foreground object; and determining the context of the foreground objects based on the category of the dominant foreground object. The method of claim 1, wherein determining, by the electronic device (100), the context of the background objects comprising: determining a dominant background object from the background objects based on at least one of an activity in the background, an event information, a shape of the background object, a size of the background object, and a motion of the background object; classifying the dominant background object; and determining the context of the background objects based on the category of the dominant background object. An electronic device (100) for rendering a background in an image, comprising: a processor (130); a memory (140) comprising the image; and a background modification engine (110), coupled to the processor (130) and the memory (140), configured to: recognize foreground objects and background objects in the image, determine a context of the foreground objects and a context of the background objects in the image, determine a background pattern based on the context of the foreground objects and the context of the background objects, modify the background of the image based on the background pattern, and cause to display the image with the modified background. The electronic device (100) of claim 6, wherein the electronic device (100) is further configured to be operated according to one of the methods in claims 2 to 5. An intelligent background rendering method in an image capture, comprising: identifying objects and/or surfacespresent in a background of a captured shot; performing scene analysis to recognize a shape of each object and/or surface in the background; performing scene analysis of objects present in a foreground to determine a context of the captured shot; configuring an artificial intelligence engine (120) to identify pre-defined shapes and/or patterns from a repository, relating to the context of the captured shot; and, transforming at least in part, the shape of the objects and/or surfaces present in the background with that of the pre-defined shapes and /or patterns relating to the context of the captured shot. The method of claim 8, wherein transforming at least in part, the shape of the objects and/or surfaces present in the background with that of the pre-defined shapes and /or patterns relating to the context of the captured shot comprises recommending the shape of the objects and/or surfaces present in the background with that of the pre-defined shapes and /or patterns relating to the context of the captured shot. The method of claim 8, wherein the objects and/or surfaces in the background are blurred. The method of claim 8, wherein transforming the shape includes overlaying the objects and/or surfaces with the pre-defined shapes. The method of claim 8, wherein transforming the shape includes replacing the objects and/or surfaces with the pre-defined shapes. An electronic device (100) for intelligent background rendering in an image capture, comprising: a processor (130) a memory (140) comprising a captured shot; an artificial intelligence engine (120) coupled to the processor (130) and the memory (140); and a background modification engine (110), coupled to the processor (130) and the memory (140) and, configured to: identify objects and/or surfaces present in a background of the captured shot, perform scene analysis to recognize a shape of each object and/or surface in the background, perform scene analysis of objects present in a foreground to determine a context of the captured shot, configure the artificial intelligence engine (120) to identify pre-defined shapes and/or patterns from a repository, relating to the context of the captured shot, and transform at least in part, the shape of the objects and/or surfaces present in the background with that of the pre-defined shapes and /or patterns relating to the context of the captured shot. The electronic device (100) of claim 13, wherein the electronic device (100) is further configured to be operated according to one of the methods in claims 9 to 12.
